product_overview: Kadhambam is a premium e-commerce storefront for dry fruits and nuts, designed to provide a polished browsing and purchasing experience for customers. It also includes a secure admin area for managing products, categories, users, and orders.
core_goals: Browse featured products and the full product catalog
Search, filter, sort, and view individual product details
Manage a shopping cart and complete checkout with payment verification details
Create an account and sign in to access customer features
View account information and past orders
Administer products, categories, users, and orders from a protected dashboard

features.name: Home and Store Navigation
features.description: Customers can land on the storefront, explore featured products, and move between the main shopping sections.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View featured products on the home page -> Select a product to open its detail page
Navigate to / -> Use the main store navigation to go to the shop page -> Browse the product catalog
Navigate to / -> Use the main store navigation to go to the about page -> Read the store story
Navigate to / -> Use the main store navigation to go to the contact page -> View contact information and send an inquiry

features.name: Product Browsing and Discovery
features.description: Customers can search, filter, sort, and open products from the shop catalog.
user_flows: Navigate to /shop -> Search for a product by name -> Filter by category -> Sort the results -> View the updated product grid -> Open a product detail page from a product card
Navigate to /shop -> Browse the product grid -> Add a product to the cart from the catalog
Navigate to /shop -> Browse the product grid -> Open a product detail page -> Return to the shop page

features.name: Product Detail Viewing
features.description: Customers can review a product’s images, description, price, and quantity options before adding it to the cart.
user_flows: Navigate to /product/:id -> View product images and product information -> Select a quantity -> Add the product to the cart -> See the cart updated
Navigate to /product/:id -> Review the product details -> Return to the shop page

features.name: Shopping Cart Management
features.description: Customers can review items in their cart and adjust quantities before checkout.
user_flows: Navigate to /cart -> View cart items and cart total -> Increase an item quantity -> Decrease an item quantity -> Remove an item from the cart -> Review the updated total
Navigate to /cart -> View cart items -> Continue shopping
Navigate to /cart -> Review the cart -> Proceed to checkout

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Customers can register or sign in with email and password, and access account-protected features after authentication.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the sign-in form -> See the authenticated account state
Navigate to /login -> Switch to registration mode -> Fill in full name -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the registration form -> See the authenticated account state
Navigate to /login -> Switch to password reset action -> Enter the account email -> Submit the reset request -> See confirmation that the request was initiated
Navigate to /login -> Return to the home page

features.name: Customer Checkout
features.description: Authenticated customers can place an order by entering shipping details and submitting payment information for confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to /checkout -> Fill in shipping address fields -> Review the order summary -> Enter the UTR number after payment -> Place the order -> See the order success page
Navigate to /checkout -> Fill in shipping address fields -> Review the order summary -> Place the order with a missing required field -> See validation feedback before submitting

features.name: Account and Order History
features.description: Authenticated customers can view profile information and their previous orders.
user_flows: Navigate to /account -> View profile information -> View past orders
Navigate to /account -> Review account details -> Sign out

features.name: Customer Support Contact
features.description: Visitors can use the contact page to review store details and submit an inquiry.
user_flows: Navigate to /contact -> Review the store contact details -> Fill in the contact form -> Submit the inquiry -> See confirmation that the message was sent

features.name: Admin Dashboard Overview
features.description: Admins can access a protected dashboard to review store metrics and move into operational management areas.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> View dashboard statistics -> Open an admin sub-section
Navigate to /admin -> View dashboard statistics -> Go to order management
Navigate to /admin -> View dashboard statistics -> Go to product management
Navigate to /admin -> View dashboard statistics -> Go to category management
Navigate to /admin -> View dashboard statistics -> Go to user management

features.name: Admin Order Management
features.description: Admins can review orders, filter them by status, and update order status during fulfillment.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/orders -> View orders list -> Filter orders by status -> Update an order status
Navigate to /admin/orders -> View orders list -> Change an order from pending to verified -> Review the updated status

features.name: Admin Product Management
features.description: Admins can create, edit, and delete products, including uploading product images.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/products -> View products list -> Add a new product -> Fill in product details -> Upload a product image -> Save the product
Navigate to /admin/products -> View products list -> Open an existing product for editing -> Update product fields -> Save the changes
Navigate to /admin/products -> View products list -> Delete a product

features.name: Admin Category Management
features.description: Admins can manage product categories through create, update, and delete actions.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/categories -> View categories list -> Add a new category
Navigate to /admin/categories -> View categories list -> Edit a category name -> Save the change
Navigate to /admin/categories -> View categories list -> Delete a category

features.name: Admin User Management
features.description: Admins can review the registered user list and search for users by name or email.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/users -> View users list -> Search users by email or name
Navigate to /admin/users -> View users list -> Review registered user details

routes.description: Landing/home page with featured products and hero section
Browse all products with filtering and search
Login and registration page with email/password and Google OAuth
User account and order history (protected route)
Order confirmation page after successful checkout
Admin product management with Cloudinary image upload

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and register with email/password or Google OAuth via Firebase Auth
user_interactions: Click "Continue with Google" button for Google sign-in
Click "Register" to switch to registration mode

features.name: Product Browsing
features.description: Browse and filter products on the shop page
user_interactions: Click product card to navigate to detail
Add product to cart from shop page

features.name: Product Detail
features.description: View detailed product information and add to cart

features.name: Shopping Cart
features.description: Manage items in the shopping cart

features.name: Checkout
features.description: Complete purchase with shipping and payment info

features.name: User Account
features.description: View and manage account details and order history

api_calls.endpoint: Firestore orders collection filtered by user

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Admin overview of orders, products, users, and categories

features.name: Admin Product Management
features.description: CRUD operations on products with Cloudinary image upload
user_interactions: Fill product form (name, price, description, category)
Click delete icon to remove product

features.name: Admin Order Management
features.description: View and update order statuses

features.name: Admin Category Management
features.description: CRUD operations on product categories

features.name: Admin User Management
features.description: View registered users
user_interactions: Search users by email or name

known_limitations.issue: Admin routes require specific UID or email configured in VITE_ADMIN_UIDS / VITE_ADMIN_EMAILS env vars; tests cannot access admin pages without valid admin credentials
known_limitations.impact: Admin panel tests will be skipped or require special test credentials

known_limitations.issue: Google OAuth sign-in opens a popup which cannot be automated in headless browser tests
known_limitations.impact: Google sign-in flow cannot be fully tested automatically

known_limitations.issue: Firebase Auth and Firestore require live credentials; tests depend on real Firebase project
known_limitations.impact: Tests run against live Firebase backend, not a mock
